plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Weidmuller industrial managed Ethernet switches (enterprise PEN 38187). Public product facts confirm Weidmuller managed switches support SNMP management, but no reliable public row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Switch SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — Weidmuller industrial managed Ethernet switches and other IF-MIB compliant Weidmuller switches.
name: Switch
